title: HEFTMAN Small Glass Jars with Lids - 24 Pack Airtight 250ml Jam Jars with Red Gingham Lids for Use as Pickle Jar, Jams, Honey, Candle Making, Preserving, Food Storage - Hexagonal Shape (Empty)
features: VALUE SET OF 24 JARS - This 24-pack of hexagonal empty chutney jars with lids checks all the boxes, screw tops, adorable gingham lids, and airtight seals. Make and store your jam securely with these premium jars!
HIGH QUALITY HEXAGON JARS - Our small 250ml glass jars with lids are manufactured with extra-thick glass for maximum durability. This design ensures years of enjoyment and functionality.

MULTIPURPOSE JARS WITH LIDS - These hexagon mason jars are perfect for herbs, spice, food, liquid, canning, as a pickle jar, and perfect as jars for jam making. You can also use them for party favours, wedding gifts, and thoughtful DIY presents.

FOOD-SAFE WITH TIGHT SEAL - Each hexagonal glass jar with lid features a screw top with an effective airtight seal. These jam jars with lids 250ml are BPA-free and made with 100% food-grade glass to keep you and your loved ones safe.

QUICK AND EASY TO CLEAN - These classic small jars with lids are a must-have for jam storage and projects. Store your jam, bath salts, body butter, or lotion, and then easily clean in the dishwasher after each use.
description: Product Description High Quality & Practical Our 250ml space saving hexagonal jars are manufactured with extra-thick glass for maximum durability. Versatile Perfect for herbs, spice, food, jam, liquid, pickles, or for party favours, wedding gifts, and thoughtful DIY presents. Food Safe Along with being BPA-free and made with 100% food-grade glass, they have an effective airtight seal, ensuring your food remains fresh! HEFTMAN Small Glass Jars with Lids - 24 Pack Each traditional gingham jam jar offers various applications. Use as pickle jars, and if you enjoy making jams, or DIY body products, this set of 24 jars for jam making with lids is just the thing! Airtight lids, oven-safe glass, and food-grade materials are perfect for all usages. You can store party favours, wedding gifts, bath salts, candy, lotions, spices and more in these dishwasher-safe small jam jars! These hexagonal spice jars with lids are an ideal option for fulfilling all your jam-making needs.
